market_sentiment.label: 中性
market_sentiment.summary: 資料更新中，請稍後再試

articles.title: How memory tools can make AI models worse
articles.description: New research suggests that AI memory systems can degrade model performance and encourage sycophantic tendencies.

articles.title: The quantum clock is ticking: it's Bitcoin's problem, not Ethereum's
articles.description: A recent research note published by Citi analysts reached a conclusion about quantum risk that should give every institutional bitcoin holder pause, Tabar explains.

articles.title: Mastercard prepares for a future where AI agents make payments
articles.description: The company is working with Coinbase, Stripe and other companies to build trusted payment systems for AI-driven commerce.

articles.title: Bitcoin rises despite US inflation hitting 3-year high: Where will BTC price go?
articles.description: BTC's rebound shows signs of weakening under a string of technical resistance levels, raising the odds of a dip below $60,000 in June.

articles.title: Zest launches a restaurant discovery app powered by where people actually eat
articles.description: Backed by Alexis Ohanian’s 776 and Kindred Ventures, Zest uses transaction data and AI to generate restaurant recommendations based on users’ real dining habits and the places they frequent.

articles.title: Cybersecurity researchers aren’t happy about the guardrails on Anthropic’s Fable
articles.description: Cybersecurity researchers are complaining that Anthropic's new model Fable has guardrails that are too strict for any cybersecurity work.

articles.title: Why enterprise AI will be a major focus at VivaTech 2026
articles.description: While Silicon Valley continues pushing aggressively into large language models and consumer-facing AI products, many European companies are focused on applying AI to complex systems already embedded into everyday life.

articles.title: Onchain gambling keeps rolling with $14B quarter despite crypto slump: TRM Labs
articles.description: TRM Labs said onchain gambling reached $51 billion in 2025, with repeat users and stablecoin flows helping the sector remain resilient during a broader crypto market pullback.

articles.title: AI deepfake election ad in Minnesota raises transparency concerns
articles.description: A deepfake campaign attack ad in the US state of Minnesota has raised questions around the ethics of using AI in political ads and the regulations surround AI use.

articles.title: Datadog veterans launch AI coding startup Niteshift on a bet against Big AI lock-in
articles.description: AI coding agent startup Niteshift has raised a $7 million seed round from a who's who of angels. It's betting companies will want power over, not lock-in with model makers.

articles.title: The three hard-tech moonshots fueling SpaceX’s unbelievable IPO
articles.description: Most of the value in SpaceX's IPO is effectively a call option on the company's ambitious space data center plans.

articles.title: Pinterest bets on creators with Amazon Storefront integration
articles.description: Pinterest is adding support for Amazon Storefronts, allowing creators to earn affiliate commissions more easily while showcasing their product recommendations in one place.

articles.title: Tenev says Robinhood won underwriter approval as crypto markets front-run mega IPOs
articles.description: Robinhood’s new IPO underwriter role comes as SpaceX prepares a record-breaking public offering, with retail brokers and crypto-native derivatives platforms racing to shape price discovery and access.

articles.title: Warner Music acquires AI attribution startup Sureel AI
articles.description: Through the acquisition, WMG aims to better track when its artists' work is used in AI-generated content or for training AI models.

articles.title: Crypto outflows are sentiment shock, not structural crisis: CoinShares' Butterfill
articles.description: CoinShares’ James Butterfill said recent crypto outflows reflect a macro-driven sentiment shock, while other analysts warned Bitcoin’s rebound may remain fragile.

articles.title: 黏土礦物橫跨 600 公里，羅莎琳·富蘭克林號探測車降落地點藏著火星古海洋遺跡
articles.description: 儘管歐洲太空總署（ESA）計畫中的羅莎琳·富蘭克林號（Rosalind Franklin）火星探測車目前被迫延 […]

articles.title: Pyth unveils continuous pricing indexes for US stocks and commodities
articles.description: Coinbase, Kraken and dYdX are adopting Pyth's new indexes, which provide continuous pricing for US stocks, gold and oil outside market hours.

articles.title: Prediction markets get first U.S. rule proposal as CFTC pursues contract reviews
articles.description: The Commodity Futures Trading Commission opened a proposed rule for public comment that sets an approach to determine contracts in the "public interest."

articles.title: Michael Saylor gets into public debate over claims that Strategy's latest share sale was dilutive
articles.description: Strategy's BTC Yield fell from 13.0% to 12.8% following its latest bitcoin purchase, prompting a debate on X over whether the purchase was dilutive to shareholders.

articles.title: Jedify raises $24M to help companies arm AI agents with context on their business
articles.description: The funding round was led by Norwest, with participation S Capital VC, Cerca Partners, and Oceans Ventures. Snowflake Ventures also participated as a strategic investor.
